customAttributes.description:
At the beginning of your upkeep, you gain X life, where X is the number of cards in your hand minus 4.
A numbered series of 500 copies of this card was found within the The Brothers' War Collector Booster product. The number on the card you receive will vary from the number pictured in the listing unless otherwise shown in a Listing with Photo.
customAttributes.flavorText:
"Ringed by white stone, Terisia was a city of scholarship and knowledge, where magic promised a brighter future to a world devoured by artifice."
—The Antiquities War
